given: Sentry metric issue sidebar queries contributing issues for a priority change event during an open period

should_find.finding: metricDetectorTriggeredSection uses the event date instead of the open period start, so contributing issue queries for priority change events use the wrong time window

notes.body: Regression seed from Sentry fix 44801511e3636356c7733ad1b33c8733d691c067. metricDetectorTriggeredSection uses the event date instead of the open period start, so contributing issue queries for priority change events use the wrong time window
